emergency_definition: repeated breaker trip in medical office

BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to connect you with one of our team members. Please hold for just a moment.
We are escalating to our electrical response team and you are in priority queue.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. Have a great day.

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the reason for your call?
Is this an emergency, such as a repeated breaker trip in a medical office?
I'm going to connect you with our on-call electrician. Can you please provide some more information about the issue?
We are unable to reach our on-call electrician at this time. We will have someone call you back within 9 minutes.
We will create a ticket for your non-emergency issue. Can you please provide some more details and a preferred callback time?
Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. We will be in touch soon.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are escalating to our electrical response team and you are in priority queue

tool_invocation_note: No tools will be mentioned during the conversation.
